words.example: Tell me the truth. - Dis-moi la vérité.
Age brings wisdom. - L'âge apporte la sagesse.
What's your opinion? - Quelle est ton opinion?
Everyone has their own beliefs. - Tout le monde a ses propres croyances.
What's the meaning of life? - Quelle est le sens de la vie?
What's your purpose? - Quel est ton but?
